headline: USDT Dominates Payments, USDC Leads DeFi with $1B

article.title: USDT wins payments, USDC wins DeFi as stablecoins diverge: Dune
article.summary: Dune data shows Tether's USDT has become crypto’s dominant payments stablecoin while Circle's USDC powers DeFi, highlighting how blockchain choice shapes stablecoin use.

headline: Tether Invests $10M in Latam Crypto Exchange

article.summary: Mercado Bitcoin will use the funding to expand tokenized finance across Latin America, adding to Tether's growing portfolio of infrastructure investments.

headline: Amazon Bonds Slump 2% Amid $10B AI Debt Surge

article.title: Amazon’s New Bonds Get Cooler Reception as AI Debt Floods Market
article.summary: When Amazon.com Inc. sold its biggest ever bond earlier this year, it was inundated with investor orders amid hype about the artificial intelligence boom. This time around, there’s less fanfare.
